title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Salesforce India Ventures Solutions in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
